donjonmc.system.first_join: §5[System] §rYou have been chosen. Your adventure begins with 5 hearts and all stats at 0. Be careful.
donjonmc.system.level_up: §5[System] §6LEVEL UP! §rYou have reached §alevel %d§r. You have been healed and cleansed.

donjonmc.trial.start: §5[System] §rYour trial begins. §6Defeat all Guardians §rto reveal your class.
donjonmc.trial.complete: §5[System] §6CLASS OBTAINED! §rYou are now §a%s§r. Your powers awaken.
donjonmc.trial.error: §c[System] §rError: unable to access the trial dimension.
donjonmc.trial.no_eligible: §c[System] §rYou must be level 50 and classless to access the trial.
donjonmc.cmd.raid.invite.received: §5[Raid] §r§a%s§r invites you. Type §e/raid accept§r to join.
donjonmc.raid.portal.label: Portal:
donjonmc.dungeon.portal.appeared: §5[System] §rA §e%s§r dungeon gate has appeared near the surface! §7[%s, %s, %s]
donjonmc.dungeon.activate.not_leader: §c[System] §rOnly the group leader can activate a dungeon gate.
donjonmc.dungeon.activate.too_few: §c[System] §rThis dungeon requires at least §e%d§r players (you have §e%d§r).
donjonmc.dungeon.activate.not_ready: §c[System] §rThe following players are too far from the gate: §e%s§r.
donjonmc.dungeon.boss.defeated: §6[System] §rThe boss has been defeated! The exit gate has appeared. §eRight-click§r the portal to leave.
donjonmc.dungeon.double.triggered: §d[System] §r§lDOUBLE DUNGEON§r detected! A hidden room has opened beyond the boss.
donjonmc.dungeon.cartenon.name: Cartenon
donjonmc.punishment.entered: §4[System] §rYou have failed. The System has issued its judgment. Survive §c15 minutes§r or face the consequences.
donjonmc.punishment.survived: §5[System] §rYou endured the punishment. You are returned to your world.
donjonmc.punishment.already_active: §c[System] §rYou are already in a punishment instance.
donjonmc.punishment.full: §c[System] §rBoth punishment instances are currently occupied. You will be judged when a slot opens.
donjonmc.punishment.death.penalty: §4[System] §r§lPUNISHMENT FAILED. §r3 of your stat points have been stripped.
donjonmc.punishment.death.no_stats: §4[System] §rYou have no stats left to lose. Contemplate your weakness.
donjonmc.punishment.no_escape: §4[System] §rThere is no escape. Endure your punishment.
donjonmc.punishment.expired_offline: §4[System] §rYou failed your punishment while offline. Your stats have been stripped.
donjonmc.quest.assigned: §5[System] §rYour daily quests have been assigned. Complete §e4 quests§r within §a1 hour§r.
donjonmc.quest.started: §5[System] §rYour daily quests have begun. Complete §e4 quests§r within §a1 hour§r.
donjonmc.quest.all_done: §5[System] §6ALL QUESTS COMPLETE! §rWell done. The System is pleased.
donjonmc.quest.skill_points_reward: §5[System] §rYou earned §e+2 skill points§r as a reward.
donjonmc.quest.failed: §4[System] §rTime is up. You have failed the System. Prepare yourself.
donjonmc.quest.disabled: §7[System] §rYour daily quests have been §cdisabled§r by an administrator.
donjonmc.quest.enabled: §5[System] §rYour daily quests have been §are-enabled§r by an administrator.
